title: CA14 4JH, FCC Recycling (UK) Ltd: environmental permit variation application advertisement – EPR/MB3091DL/V003
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain variations (changes) to radioactive substances permits.  The arrangements are explained in their Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:    what the variation is about   when you need to comment by    The Environment Agency will decide what permit conditions need changing. "
